name: EBS volume not encrypted
description: One or more EBS volumes are not encrypted. Unencrypted volumes expose data-at-rest to physical access attacks and violate data protection requirements in regulated industries.
remediation: Enable EBS encryption by default at the account/region level: aws ec2 enable-ebs-encryption-by-default. For existing unencrypted volumes, create an encrypted snapshot and restore to a new encrypted volume.
